ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "label" TEXT /* Type label of the product (e.g., Cleanser, Facial Wash) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand manufacturing the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Full name of the product */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the product in cents */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured on the homepage */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or attributes for the product (e.g., normal, sensitive) */,
  "product_link" TEXT /* Link to the product page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_tags FOREIGN KEY ("tags") REFERENCES product_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the brand was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the brand information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the tag belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product is expected to be restocked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the product is stocked */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the platform's newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" INTEGER /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Tax applied to the product in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order item information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of shipping in cents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the shipping record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the shipping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)
